Good service.

reviews.comment:
Q linda experiencia cada ves q paro a cargar..me llevo esas medialunas espectaculares..gente..si no conocen..vayan a probar..nada q hacer las otra q están en la ruta hacia la costa..estas se pasan de ricas..aparte la atención muy atentos..genial

(Translated by Google)
What a lovely experience every time I stop to fill up... I take those spectacular croissants... people... if you don't know them... go try them... there's nothing to do with the other ones on the route to the coast... these are beyond delicious... apart from the very attentive service... great
